subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of existence and Educator of the unseen and the seen! This is a leaf from among the leaves of the Tree of Thy Cause that hath responded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الوجود و مربی الغیب و الشهود هذه ورقه من اوراق سدره امرک قد اجابت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
